title: Database alert received
message: INC-2026-00422 reports DB connection pool saturation on PAY-APP-DBPOOL-01.

payload.current_state: Active DB connections are 486 of 500; checkout latency is 2.8 seconds.
payload.requested_outcome: Reduce connection pressure without restarting the database.

title: SOP retrieved
message: Stabilize the app tier first, preserve DB sessions, require approval, and validate pool recovery.

payload.title: Application Connection Pool Saturation
controls: Do not kill database sessions as the first action.
Require approval for pool setting changes.
Validate active connections and checkout latency.

title: Historical tickets compared
message: 5 similar tickets found; 1 unsafe precedent flagged.

items.summary: Drained app workers and reset pool safely.
Lowered app burst pool after approval.
Restarted app pool with connection validation.
Engineer killed active database sessions during pool saturation.
items.notes: Unsafe precedent: user transactions failed after forced session termination.

items.summary: Pool reset did not recover because a code leak persisted.
items.notes: Escalated to application engineering after validation failed.

title: SOP beats history
message: Unsafe history killed DB sessions; SOP requires app-tier pressure reduction first.

blocked_precedent.summary: Engineer killed active database sessions during pool saturation.
blocked_precedent.notes: Unsafe precedent: user transactions failed after forced session termination.

title: Evidence summary structured
message: Proceed with SOP-governed mock remediation for DB connection pool saturation.

payload.outcome: Proceed with SOP-governed mock remediation for DB connection pool saturation.
sop_controls: Do not kill database sessions as the first action.
Require approval for pool setting changes.
Validate active connections and checkout latency.
payload.governance_note: SOP beats history: HIST-DBPOOL-2026-009 is visible as a warning, not copied into the remediation plan.

title: Safe remediation plan generated
message: Reduce Payments API pool pressure and restart the app pool in mock mode.

payload.summary: Reduce Payments API pool pressure and restart the app pool in mock mode.
payload.action_preview: Mock action: drain Payments API workers, lower burst pool from 160 to 100, restart app pool.
payload.estimated_effect: Active DB connections reduce from 486 to 255 and checkout latency drops below 500 ms.
safeguards: Human approval is required before remediation.
SOP controls override unsafe historical precedent.
payload.escalation_condition: Escalate to DBA if connections remain above 350 after app-pool remediation.

title: Policy gate passed with approval hold
message: Policy allows planning but requires human approval before mock execution.

checks.name: Target scope
checks.message: Targets are limited to approved scenario resources.

checks.name: Dry-run guard
checks.message: Plan uses a dry-run or mock-only action preview.

checks.name: Human approval
checks.message: Human approval is required before remediation.

checks.name: Mock-only execution
checks.message: Plan is constrained to mock execution.

title: Approval package structured
message: Approve mock-only remediation for DB connection pool saturation.

payload.operator_message: Approve mock-only remediation for DB connection pool saturation.
payload.expected_safe_effect: Active DB connections reduce from 486 to 255 and checkout latency drops below 500 ms.

title: Human approval required
message: Operator review is required before mock remediation can continue.

payload.side_effects: Replay mode disables approval side effects.

title: Mock remediation executed
message: Mock app-pool remediation reduced active database connections and preserved sessions.

title: Scenario validation passed
message: Connections dropped from 486 to 255 and checkout latency recovered to 410 ms.

payload.name: Scenario validation
payload.message: Connections dropped from 486 to 255 and checkout latency recovered to 410 ms.

title: RCA and audit evidence generated
message: Payments API worker burst settings exhausted the shared DB connection pool.

payload.root_cause: Payments API worker burst settings exhausted the shared DB connection pool.
payload.validation: Connections dropped from 486 to 255 and checkout latency recovered to 410 ms.
payload.business_impact: Payments API remained protected during the synthetic workflow.
follow_up: Tune max pool and worker settings.
Add alerting for pool growth rate.

title: Closure decision required
message: Remediation is validated. Operator can close the incident now or keep it under observation before closure.

options.label: Approve closure
options.message: Close the incident with RCA and audit evidence attached.

options.label: Observe first
options.message: Keep the incident under observation, recheck metrics, then close.

title: Incident closed
message: INC-2026-00422 was closed with RCA, evidence, and validation attached.
